entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A staple food crop biofortified for enhanced grain Fe and Zn concentration

entities.name: GRAIN FE CONCENTRATION
entities.description: The concentration of iron in the grains of sorghum

entities.name: GRAIN ZN CONCENTRATION
entities.description: The concentration of zinc in the grains of sorghum

entities.name: AGRONOMIC TRAITS
entities.description: General agricultural characteristics including yield, height, and flowering time

entities.name: GENE ACTION
entities.description: The process by which genes interact to produce specific phenotypic traits

entities.name: HETEROSIS
entities.description: The phenomenon where hybrid offspring exhibit superior traits compared to their parents

entities.name: COMBINING ABILITY
entities.description: The capacity of parents to transmit favorable traits to their offspring

entities.name: LINE X TESTER MATING DESIGN
entities.description: A breeding design used to evaluate the combining ability of parents

entities.name: DAYS TO 50% FLOWERING
entities.description: The number of days required for 50% of the crop to flower

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of grain produced per unit area

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: The vertical measurement of the sorghum plant

entities.name: 100 SEEDS WEIGHT
entities.description: The combined weight of 100 seeds

entities.name: SCA
entities.description: Specific Combining Ability, indicating non-additive gene action

entities.name: GCA
entities.description: General Combining Ability, indicating additive gene action

entities.name: NON-ADDITIVE GENE ACTION
entities.description: Gene interactions where the effect of one gene depends on the presence of others

entities.name: DOMINANT GENE ACTION
entities.description: A type of gene action where one allele masks the effect of another

entities.name: HETEROSIS BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding strategy aimed at exploiting heterosis to improve traits

entities.name: SIMPLE SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding method based on selecting plants with desired phenotypes

entities.name: PARBHANI SHAKTI
entities.description: A biofortified sorghum variety released in 2018 with high Fe, Zn, and yield

entities.name: PROTEIN
entities.description: The protein content within the sorghum grain

entities.name: PHYTATES CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of phytates in the grain, which can affect nutrient absorption

entities.name: MICRONUTRIENT MALNUTRITION
entities.description: A dietary deficiency of essential micronutrients
